title: Flywheel Code Review Findings
description: Structured output schemas for Flywheel code review subagents. Root validation accepts either the full artifact payload or the compact return payload.

file.description: Relative file path from repository root

line.description: Primary line number of the issue

autofix_class.description: Conservative recommendation for how this issue should be handled after synthesis

owner.description: Who should own the next action for this finding after synthesis

requires_verification.description: Whether any fix for this finding must be re-verified with targeted tests or a focused follow-up review

suggested_fix.description: Concrete minimal fix. Omit or null if no good fix is obvious.

pre_existing.description: True if this issue exists in unchanged code unrelated to the current diff

evidence.description: Code-grounded evidence. At least one item.

reviewer.description: Persona name that produced this output

residual_risks.description: Risks the reviewer noticed but could not confirm as findings

testing_gaps.description: Missing test coverage the reviewer identified

findings.description: List of code review findings. Empty array if no issues found.
Compact reviewer findings returned to the orchestrator.

confidence_thresholds.suppress: Below 0.60 -- do not report. Exception: P0 findings at 0.50+ may be reported.
confidence_thresholds.flag: 0.60-0.69 -- include only when clearly actionable with concrete evidence.
confidence_thresholds.confident: 0.70-0.84 -- real and important. Report with full evidence.

severity_definitions.P0: Critical breakage, exploitable vulnerability, data loss/corruption. Must fix before merge.
severity_definitions.P1: High-impact defect likely hit in normal usage, breaking contract. Should fix.
severity_definitions.P2: Moderate issue with meaningful downside. Fix if straightforward.
severity_definitions.P3: Low-impact, narrow scope, minor improvement. User's discretion.

autofix_classes.safe_auto: Local, deterministic code or test fix suitable for the in-skill fixer.
autofix_classes.gated_auto: Concrete fix exists, but it changes behavior, permissions, contracts, or another sensitive boundary that deserves explicit approval.
autofix_classes.manual: Actionable issue that requires design decisions or cross-cutting changes.
autofix_classes.advisory: Informational or operational item that should be surfaced in the report only.

owners.review-fixer: The in-skill fixer can own this when policy allows.
owners.downstream-resolver: Turn this into residual work for later resolution.
owners.human: A person must make a judgment call before code changes should continue.
owners.release: Operational or rollout follow-up; do not convert into code-fix work automatically.

return_tiers.description: Finding fields are split into two tiers. Use `definitions.artifact_output` for full artifact validation and `definitions.compact_output` for orchestrator compact-return validation.
return_tiers.merge_tier: Returned to orchestrator: title, severity, file, line, confidence, autofix_class, owner, requires_verification, pre_existing, suggested_fix. Plus top-level reviewer, residual_risks, testing_gaps.
return_tiers.detail_tier: Required in artifact file, omitted from compact return: why_it_matters and evidence.
